offer: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 policy updates/month, missing timely alerts causes compliance issues. We provide a regulatory change tracker instead of manual tracking of regulatory changes.
problem: Lack of timely alerts on regulatory changes
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to insurance brokers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among brokers
try_it: Let users try real-time alerts and dashboard for tracking changes
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
Facilitate one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
